questions.question_text: Calculate the row major and column major address of an array[10][20][5] element, Arr[5][4][3] saved at address 2000 taking 4 bytes to store 1 element. Insert 2, 15, 55, 65, 50, 58 in a Binary Search Tree. Delete 55. What would be the minimum and maximum height of a Binary Search Tree with 1500 nodes and why? Find 3-cluster using greedy approach for the graph.

subparts.text: Write a program to find and print the node of intersection in two singly linked lists. .
Insert the following keys in a hash table of length 11 using double hashing, {33, 23, 39, 55, 47, 25, 58, 77, 41}.
Insert 2, 15, 55, 65, 50, 58, 10, 1, 16, 51, 55, 30, 42, 15 in a Binary Search Tree. Delete 55, 2.

questions.question_text: Attempt any two parts Align the sequences “Test” and “Toast” with minimum cost using DP. Cost of converting vowel to vowel or consonant to consonant is 1. Cost of converting vowel to consonant and vice-versa is 3. Gap penalty is 2. For the set S = {1, 3, 5, 6} is subset with sum of 8 possible? Use Backtracking approach to find the solution. For Activities A1 to A10, the start time are S[t] = [1,3,2,4,8,7,9,11,9,12 ] and finish times f = [3,4,5,7,9,10,11,12,13,14]. Find the largest possible set of mutually exclusive activities. Give Algorithm/code.
